title: Hanuman Chalisa
intro: A devotional hymn dedicated to Lord Hanuman.
meaning: This Chalisa praises Hanuman's strength, devotion, and service to Lord Rama.

faq.q1: When should I recite Hanuman Chalisa?
faq.q2: Can it be recited in any language?
faq.a2: Yes, devotion matters more than language.
